name: compliance trace: each consulted framework records freshness_at_generation status from C-15 gate (fresh-within-fetch-frequency | stale-warn-degraded | offline-cached | operator-bypass)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance nist-csf-2 --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "fresh-within-fetch-frequency" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
